reviews.review_msg: He is kind, reasonable and knowledgeable. He relate material to real world issues. Often tell us some important news in real world and give us his insight. He also have extensive insight in historical economic theory, which help me understand theory better. He also teach extra material that help students who want to go to graduate school. very kind

Harris is the most boring prof you will ever have. He is unenthoused and monotone. His exams are extremely easy though. The midterm for econ 105 was all multiple choice and some of the questions were so easy they made me laugh. You'll have to teach yourself mainly from the textbook, but you'll probably get a decent mark at least.
he can be boring, but i found him decend enough to get me interested in the course. exams are fully based on textbook, good prof :)

Clearly knows his material, although most of what's explained in lecture is never tested. Exams and midterms are stolen off of textbook website, and makes very little effort to answer any emails or clarify things. Boring as hell, lectures are not actually mandatory unless you want a 10% clicker grade.

This class was about financial crisis and it was pretty fun class. Materials were helpful and prof has a lot of knowledge about financial crisis too. He just does not email you back. One midterm was easy and another midterm was relatively hard and final was pretty fair. I've learned a lot from this class.

I feel bad for the people who took him in lower division classes, I cant see this being his thing at all. As for 403, this is DEFINITELY his interest area. Tons of knowledge and understanding, and makes things make sense, textbook theory he is not so keen on  but once he starts talking about something hes interested in...phenomenal!
Why does he teach if he hates students so much?  Gives a bad impression of the Econ department.
He doesn't seem interested in teaching at all. The lectures are very scattered. I wouldn't recommend taking a class with him.

Very good prof.Interesting, and surprisingly, can be funny. Had little knowledge and interest in the subject before i took the course, now I love it. Midterms and final were fair, make sure you read the book. Would def recommend taking this course and having this prof.
Awesome prof. Top academic, too. Pleasure to be in his class.
